headline: Trump 🍊👑 BOOED at Knicks 🏀 NBA FINALS 🎉 MSG Security GAUNTLET 😤
text: Trump 🍊👑 BOOED at MSG 🏟️🔒 as first sitting prez 🫡 at NBA FINALS 🏀💥 Knicks vs Spurs 🏆 – ticketholders SWEATING 😰💦 in TWO-BLOCK LINES after airport TSA GAUNTLET 🛫🚧 Metal barriers BLOCKED 🍺🍻 bar traffic making pubs GHOST TOWNS 👻💸 NYC streets SHUT DOWN 🚫🚗 Marine One CHOPPER ✈️🌀 & motorcade convoy to Queens-born prez 🗽🍕 game with granddaughter Kai 👧💖 & owner James Dolan 💼🤑 Celebs courtside: Timothee Chalamet 🍿😍 Tina Fey 😂 Tina Fey Tracy Morgan 🤣 Ben Stiller 😎 Larry David 👴 Spike Lee 🎥 Derek Jeter ⚾ Eli Manning 🏈 Mayor Zohran Mamdani 🗳️💰 dropped 1K on tix! 😱📉 Boos erupted when Jumbotron showed Trump saluting anthem 🎤🫡 Security shut vibes 😩 'killing the vibe' one fan moaned Knicks fans in orange & blue 🌆🏀 climbed SCAFFOLDING 🧗‍♂️ watched on laptops at Bryant Park watch party after Trump cancelled street bash 🚫🎉 Empire State & One WTC lit up Knicks colors 🗼🟠🔵 Disgruntled commuters cursed the 'annoying' disruption but Anthony Pulley 43 said 'pretty cool he showed up' 👍🍕 Knicks first Finals since 99 after decades of SUCKAGE 📉 now STUNNING REVERSAL 🏆🔥 Spike Lee courtside with Larry David making Seinfeld-level shade 😏👀 Tickets resale 10K-100K 💸💸 'semi-free on TV' Trump shrugged 🤷‍♂️🍿
